---
name: Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest corrections or additions for Boarddy's documentation or Wiki.
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ''

---

**What documentation page or file needs improvement?**
Specify the file or section (e.g. `README.md`, developer mode instructions, custom keyboard shortcuts guide).

**Describe the improvement or correction**
Provide a clear description of the typo, incorrect instruction, outdated CLI command, or missing step.

**Proposed Content / Wording (if applicable)**
Provide the exact text or diff you suggest adding or modifying:
```markdown
- Old outdated text
+ Proposed new corrected text
```

**Additional Context**
Any additional links, reference specs, or explanations.
